missing_system_owner.reason: No technical or business owner is assigned to this codebase AI component.
missing_system_owner.recommended_resolution: Assign a lead software engineer or system owner to assume responsibility for the component.

missing_processing_purpose.reason: The operational purpose of processing data via this AI signal is undefined.
missing_processing_purpose.recommended_resolution: Document the concrete business goals and customer data paths utilized by the AI component.

missing_ai_use_case_description.reason: No high-level usage description is associated with this AI dependency.
missing_ai_use_case_description.recommended_resolution: Add a brief system summary mapping the component to corporate AI use case registers.

missing_model_or_provider_identification.reason: The exact external model name (e.g. gpt-4o) or hosting provider is not explicitly declared.
missing_model_or_provider_identification.recommended_resolution: Configure the specific model variant and hosting region in system properties.

missing_vendor_terms_review.reason: No verified vendor data privacy agreement (DPA) or commercial SLA has been reviewed for this third-party LLM provider.
missing_vendor_terms_review.recommended_resolution: Review model provider terms to verify training exclusion and data privacy protections.

missing_data_processing_assessment.reason: No data protection impact assessment (DPIA) has been completed for transfer of data to this service.
missing_data_processing_assessment.recommended_resolution: Conduct a DPIA to evaluate potential risks of transferring user identifiers to third-party endpoints.

missing_risk_classification.reason: This AI integration lacks a formal risk tier classification.
missing_risk_classification.recommended_resolution: Complete the risk assessment survey to categorize the integration (e.g. Minimal, High risk).

missing_human_oversight_description.reason: The codebase contains no documented human-in-the-loop validation or prompt guardrails safety layer description.
missing_human_oversight_description.recommended_resolution: Document human oversight procedures and validation gates implemented for LLM outputs.

missing_logging_or_retention_policy.reason: Model prompt and completion logs lack a clear retention and audit policy.
missing_logging_or_retention_policy.recommended_resolution: Define log aggregation constraints and specify standard data purging intervals.

missing_user_disclosure_assessment.reason: The system lacks user-facing disclosures indicating interaction with generative AI systems.
missing_user_disclosure_assessment.recommended_resolution: Verify if user disclosures are required and ensure notices are present on front-end components.

missing_security_review.reason: The code exposes potentially un-hashed keys or plaintext credentials in development configurations.
missing_security_review.recommended_resolution: Migrate development environment credentials to verified secrets managers immediately.

missing_export_authorization.reason: This candidate record lacks authorized digital sign-off signatures.
missing_export_authorization.recommended_resolution: Acquire technical lead cryptographical signature authorization in the compliance portal.
